◆ 为什么选择Otter？

- 可爱的水獭角色与简约设计
- 基于照片的饮食记录 – 拍摄即保存

用照片记录你的餐食，一目了然。

cn.description:
经典三国单机版

《逐鹿》是一款基于同名历史沙盘游戏引擎开发而成的三国题材回合制策略游戏。在硝烟四起、诸侯争霸的三国乱世中，玩家可以在剧本中任意选择势力，饰演主公。通过内政、外交等玩法助你运筹帷幄。带领麾下群雄，攻城略地，在辽阔的战场上开疆扩土。或兴复汉室，或成一代枭雄，皆掌握在你的手中。

问鼎九州，逐鹿三国

《逐鹿》的历史剧本以《三国演义》为蓝本推演而来，游戏贯穿历史典故，力求还原三国时期的史实风貌。玩家可以任意挑选剧本，并饰演其中一势力的主公，谋定三国，一统九州。

山河为子，天下为局

《逐鹿》以经典六角战棋玩法为核心战斗模式，玩家可以指挥部队以“六角战棋”的形式纵横驰骋于大战场之上，或与敌人短兵相接，或以计谋决胜千里之外，在矢石之间，开疆扩土。

坚甲利兵，攻无不克

在游戏中兵种可分为步兵、骑兵、机械三大类，细分则有弓兵、弩兵、盾兵、轻骑兵等十余种。还有数十种专属兵种可以携带，出征时根据战况调配兵种阵容，能够达到先发制人，克敌机先的效果。

鸾翔凤集，龙幡虎纛

根据历史文献记载以及结合三国演义内容，目前游戏中已设计武将有600余名。每个武将具有独特的特性，可以凸显武将的差异化。不仅如此，我们还为历史名将绘制了精致的专属立绘，彰显其个性。

cn.description:
《迷雾北境》（Bad North）是一款迷人又残酷的实时策略游戏。带领你绝望的子民，捍卫你宁静祥和的岛国，对抗维京部落的入侵者。指挥你忠诚的臣民充分利用每个岛屿的地理优势作为战术优势。一切都危在旦夕：失败，并看着你子民的鲜血染红了土地。
继续战斗，勇士们。不是为了权力、财富或荣耀，只希望和平再次降临这片绝境。

【游戏特色】
1.实时战术肉鸽玩法：调兵遣将抵御维京入侵，敌人会随机应变威胁你的布局。谨慎选择战场，周密规划转移路线！指挥官阵亡无法复活，一旦失败将永久失去所有进度！

2.即时战略动态博弈：你坐镇后方运筹帷幄，士兵们则在前线自主应对战局。下达战略指令，观察部队在战场上即时做出临场反应。

3.随机生成奇幻岛屿：每座岛屿皆风景如画且地形迥异。你只有一次拯救家园的机会，必须根据独特地貌制定万全之策。

4.军队养成进阶体系：愈精锐的防守带来越丰厚的战利品。将你的子民从散兵游勇逐步培养成百战雄师，用资源把民兵锻造成传奇勇士。

【联系我们】
Q群：568959503
客服QQ：2853302554/3002921159
若您在游戏过程中，遇到任何问题或有建议反馈，可通过以上任何渠道与我们进行联系。

传说！拔出法杖的人将会成为拯救世界的勇者！

《魔法工艺》是一款魔法动作roguelike游戏。游戏以被古神入侵的世界为核心，打造了一个架空的魔法奇幻世界。
玩家将作为误入此世界又拔出了传说法杖的勇者，讨伐怪物、组合独一无二的法术、击败古神、拯救这个被古神入侵的世界！


—Q版的画风—
魔性的画风，奇异的生物，无厘头的剧情，误入异世界的主角如何与这些可爱的蘑菇和触手共存？
来自异世界的大法师即将踏上独属于他的魔法创造之路！

—自由的组合—
多样的法术，独特的法杖，奇妙的组合，被选中的命运主角将如何发挥他的聪明才智挑战搭配变化？
通过击败怪物获得各种特性的法术，组合出仅属于你的禁咒魔法吧！

—随机的强化—
随机的祝福，神秘的药水，特殊的灵魂，探索之中遇见的伙伴们又将给主角带来怎样的新鲜体验？
每次挑战都会是全新的体验，选择你的天赋，加强自己的能力吧！

—炫酷的战斗—
森林的异变，城堡的古旧，时空裂缝的混乱，拔出祭坛之上法杖的你历经多次战斗，击败怪物，获得了足以拯救世界的力量，你最终的选择，将何去何从？
多彩绚丽的华丽战斗，钻研各类法术的特性，成为真正的大法师吧！

hk.description:
Otter is a simple and beautiful food diary app that helps you track what you eat every day. No calorie counting, no complicated databases – just take photos, add notes, and reflect on your eating habits.

◆ WHY OTTER?

- Clean, minimal design with an adorable otter character
- Photo-based meal tracking – snap and save
- No ads, no distractions
- iCloud sync across all your devices

◆ FEATURES

- Photo Food Journal
Capture your meals with photos. A picture is worth a thousand calories – see what you eat at a glance.

- Daily Notes
Write about your day, how you felt, or what made each meal special.

- Water Tracker
Stay hydrated! Track your daily water intake with simple tap controls.

- Weight Log
Monitor your weight trends over time with easy-to-read records.

- Timeline View
Browse your food history in a beautiful timeline. See patterns in your eating habits.

- Search & Stats
Find past meals quickly and view your eating statistics.

- iCloud Sync
Your food diary stays safe and syncs automatically across iPhone, iPad, and Mac.


◆ A MINDFUL APPROACH TO EATING

Otter doesn't judge. There's no calorie counting or strict diet plans. Just a gentle companion to help you become more aware of what you eat. 

You are what you eat – let Otter help you remember it.

Questions? Contact us at OtterDietDiary@gmail.com

hk.description:
【劇情】
 在有著神界和冥府存在的世界，其地上的某處……
 矗立在湖中，堅不可摧的古城阿本海姆維持著一定的平衡，
 但不知從何時起，由於冥府的力量而逐漸被黑暗侵蝕。
 有為了盡忠因而喪命的人，也有知道真相後背叛的人……
 因各種心思導致眾人劍拔弩張，秩序突然崩潰……

 當她與彷徨的靈魂「威斯普」相遇時，
 是否會成為照亮黑暗的那道光芒呢……

mo.description:
歡迎來到 Inkblade Idlers，一款將水墨畫的寧靜意境，與武俠世界的熱血豪情完美結合的掛機角色扮演遊戲。

輕鬆暢玩，策略深度並存
你的俠客將自動修煉與戰鬥，即使離線也能持續獲得銀兩與經驗。回到遊戲後，投入資源強化武功、裝備神兵利器與研習稀有秘籍，穩步推進你的江湖實力。

挑戰武林霸主，蒐集失傳絕學
迎戰威震四方的武林強者，展開一場場巔峰對決。每一次勝利，都能解鎖失傳的武功秘籍，讓俠客習得獨門絕技，自由打造專屬於你的戰鬥流派。

經營你的武俠世界
升級商鋪以提升收入，擴充背包收納更多珍稀裝備，並策略性配置你的隊伍。每一個決定，都是邁向一代宗師的重要一步。

遊戲特色
- 絕美水墨風格，打造充滿生命力的武俠世界
- 真正的掛機玩法，二十四小時持續成長
- 海量收集內容，包含武器、防具與稀有武功秘籍
- 策略經營系統，平衡資源、收益與戰力成長
- 多樣強力頭目戰，考驗俠客陣容的極限實力

立即下載 Inkblade Idlers，展開一段悠然卻強大的武俠旅程，無需重複練功，也能成就一代傳奇。

Otter is a simple and beautiful food diary app that helps you track what you eat every day. No calorie counting, no complicated databases – just take photos, add notes, and reflect on your eating habits.

◆ WHY OTTER?

- Clean, minimal design with an adorable otter character
- Photo-based meal tracking – snap and save
- No ads, no distractions
- iCloud sync across all your devices

◆ FEATURES

- Photo Food Journal
Capture your meals with photos. A picture is worth a thousand calories – see what you eat at a glance.

- Daily Notes
Write about your day, how you felt, or what made each meal special.

- Water Tracker
Stay hydrated! Track your daily water intake with simple tap controls.

- Weight Log
Monitor your weight trends over time with easy-to-read records.

- Timeline View
Browse your food history in a beautiful timeline. See patterns in your eating habits.

- Search & Stats
Find past meals quickly and view your eating statistics.

- iCloud Sync
Your food diary stays safe and syncs automatically across iPhone, iPad, and Mac.


◆ A MINDFUL APPROACH TO EATING

Otter doesn't judge. There's no calorie counting or strict diet plans. Just a gentle companion to help you become more aware of what you eat. 

You are what you eat – let Otter help you remember it.

Questions? Contact us at OtterDietDiary@gmail.com

Write about your day, how you felt, or what made each meal special.

You are what you eat – let Otter help you remember it.

us.description:
RadarScope is an AMS-award-winning weather visualization tool that empowers meteorologists, public safety officials, storm spotters, and weather enthusiasts to view a full suite of single-site radar data and related severe weather products. Your initial purchase provides professional radar visualization in a fully native app, free from distracting and invasive practices, with optional subscription packages to add even more capabilities.

Whether you’re scanning for a mesocyclone’s tell-tale hook echo, pinpointing the landfall of a hurricane’s eye wall, or identifying velocity couplet, hail spike, or debris ball signatures, RadarScope displays native radar data in its original radial format. You see what the radar sees almost as soon as the radar sees it, with automatic updates every two to ten minutes depending on the radar’s scanning strategy.

Your initial app purchase includes the following:

• Full suite of single-site radar products for the US, Canada, Guam, Denmark, Finland, and Germany
• 6-frame radar loops
• Two built-in providers for radar data
• Tornado, thunderstorm, flash flood, marine, snow squall, extreme wind, tropical, and other warnings in the US
• Selected severe weather warnings in Canada and Australia
• NWS-generated storm tracks with hail, TVS, and mesocyclone attributes
• Inspector and distance tools
• Color palette options for radar data
• AllisonHouse data plan integration
• Spotter Network integration for storm and location reporting
• mPING integration for submitting weather reports to NSSL
• Bundled maps with political boundaries, water bodies, and major highways, optimized for low-bandwidth use
• Support for widgets and complications
• Universal app for Apple platforms, including Apple Watch and Apple TV
• Family Sharing support

RadarScope Pro Tier One is an optional annual subscription that adds more features for tracking severe weather:

• 30-frame radar loops
• Cloud-to-ground lightning strikes
• Severe weather watches in the US and Canada
• Special weather statements in the US and Canada
• Mesoscale convective and precipitation discussions
• SPC convective, tornado, hail, wind, and fire outlooks
• WPC excessive rainfall outlooks in the US
• Local storm reports in the US
• Custom color palette support
• Multi-pane display (2 on phones; 4 on larger devices)
• Family Sharing support

RadarScope Pro Tier Two is an optional annual or monthly subscription that transforms RadarScope into a more complete visualization tool for a larger suite of weather products, including:

• Everything in Pro Tier One
• 50-frame radar loops
• A third provider for US radar data
• NEXRAD Level II radar data for the US with a 30-year historical archive
• Historical NEXRAD Level III, super-res, and non-US radar data with a 30-day archive
• Historical NWS bulletins with a 19-year archive
• GOES East and GOES West satellite products
• NSSL’s Multi-Radar Multi-Sensor (MRMS) products
• NCEP’s Real-Time Mesoscale Assimilation (RTMA) products
• Surface observations
• Atmospheric soundings in the US
• Hail size, hail probability, and azimuthal shear contours with a 30-day archive
• More detailed transportation and satellite imagery maps
• Custom color palette support for GOES, MRMS, and RTMA
• Server-sent events for radar and warning updates
• Cross-platform subscription sharing on up to 5 devices
• Family sharing support

If you choose to buy a RadarScope Pro subscription, it will be charged to your App Store account. The subscription will be auto-renewed within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period at the same price you originally paid. Subscriptions may be managed and auto-renewal disabled via your App Store account settings after the purchase. Once purchased, the subscription cannot be canceled during the active subscription period.

DTN is committed to safeguarding your privacy online. Our privacy policy is available for review at https://www.dtn.com/privacy-policy/

Please visit our web site for more information.

us.description:
这是一款关于生、死、心愿与延续的App。

小时候，我以为自己是不会老去的彼得·潘，却终究敌不过健康磨损，容颜老去。
时针转动，生命流逝，但每一次心跳都可以更加有力。

有时候，生命只是一连串的数字，多少年，多少月，多少小时，多少分钟。当你意识到这个时，往往陷入巨大的虚无感之中，惶恐不能自拔。
而现在，这些数字可以成为你重塑生命的坐标，指引你走向更健康、更长久的未来。

生辰 2.0 通过 AI 分析和科学判断，不仅预测生命的终点，更为你铺就延长生命的道路：

- 探索你的生命时钟：了解当下的预期寿命，直面生命的有限与珍贵。
- 发现延寿的可能：看见改变健康习惯能为你带来多少额外的生命时光。
- 聚合健康数据：自动追踪睡眠、锻炼、压力（HRV）、经期、喝水等十余种健康数据

美国诗人纳·斯待尔在87岁那年写道：
"如果我能够从头活过，我会试着犯更多的错。
我会放松一点，我会灵活一点。
我会爬更多的山，游更多的河，看更多的日落。"

因为了解生命的终点，才能更好地珍惜当下的每一刻。生辰2.0 探索健康的可能，让我们成为你健康旅程的长久伙伴。

【生辰 App 会员服务说明】

tr.releaseNotes:
The shadows over Hue County grow darker in the wake of a shocking murder.

Step into the elegant Noir Mansion and interrogate six suspects too sharp for their own good. They'll point fingers in every direction and offer up promises of honesty. 

But you know better. Trust nothing but your clue sheet...

Could it have been Crime Reporter Scarlett with the Mini Revolver? Maybe Private Detective Mustard used the "Civil War" Musket with Bayonet? Did Risk Analyst Plum turn himself into a liability with the Billiard Stick, or perhaps Lawyer Peacock cracked with the Meat Tenderiser. Did Signature Forger White sign off Boddy's death with the Silver Candelabra? Or maybe Con Artist Green phoned in a deadly performance with the Rotary Phone... 

With the Noir Mansion crime scene, you can toggle the special Noir filter at any time during your game! See the mansion in its full-colour glory, or drench it in deep, cinematic shadows. 

You'll also unlock Noir-themed cosmetics to dress up in true vintage style!

INCLUDES:
- A BRAND-NEW CRIME SCENE – The highly requested film-noir theme arrives in Clue/Cluedo!
- THEMED COSMETICS – This crime scene includes a new player avatar, a different card back, a themed clue sheet, a sleek dice set and 12 new tokens.
- MORE STORY TO EXPLORE – Delve into the murky backstories of each suspect and uncover their motives.
tr.description:
Join fellow detectives all over the world in the official digital board game version of Clue/Cluedo! Gather crucial evidence, interrogate suspects and solve the original murder mystery.

Follow Miss Scarlett, Colonel Mustard, Professor Plum, Chef White, Solicitor Peacock and Mayor Green through the iconic Tudor Mansion, unlocking their motives and alibis as you go. 

Enjoy Clue/Cluedo the way you remember it in Classic Mode, or jump in for a quick game with Clue Cards mode. Alternatively, if you want to really test your sleuthing skills, try a new investigation format available exclusively to Clue/Cluedo – Ultimate Detective.

In Ultimate Detective Mode, everyone answers suggestions at the same time…but secretly! 

Face your suspects in a direct interrogation as you rely on your skills of deduction to get to the truth. Experience the mystery, solve the murder and become a top-tier detective!

HOW TO PLAY CLUE/CLUEDO: 

1. Three cards are dealt face-down and set aside – this is the solution to the crime!
2. Everyone is dealt three Clue Cards. These are automatically crossed off your clue sheet, as they can’t be part of the solution. 
3. Roll the dice and move around the board. 
4. When you enter a room, you can make a suggestion – select who you think the murderer is, what weapon they used and where the crime happened. 
5. Other players will then aim to disprove your suggestion; if one of your suggestions matches a card in their hand, they show you that card to disprove it. 
6. Use your clue sheet to keep track of which characters, weapons and rooms have been disproven. 
7. Think you’ve figured it out? It’s time to make an accusation! Be careful though – if you’re right, you win, but if you are wrong, you’re out! 

FEATURES

- THE CLASSIC TUDOR MANSION – Play the beloved original board game, now rendered in stunning 3D animation and entirely ad-free! 
- A BRAND-NEW GAME MODE – Exclusive to the digital version of Clue/Cluedo, Ultimate Detective Mode lets you interrogate multiple characters at once.
- MULTIPLE MODES – Compete against cutting-edge AI opponents that adapt to your skill level for the perfect game, or challenge detectives around the world. 
- ADDITIONAL ORIGINAL CONTENT – What happened after the shocking events of Tudor Mansion? Find out in a series of original new crime scenes designed specifically for the digital version of Clue/Cluedo! New characters emerge, bringing with them new clues, motives and case files to consider as you travel around the world in search of the truth. 

Sharpen your mind with the iconic murder-mystery board game, now available on mobile!

Você também desbloqueará cosméticos temáticos Noir para se vestir no verdadeiro estilo vintage!

- UMA CENA DE CRIME NOVINHA – O tema de filme noir tão solicitado chega ao Clue/Cluedo!

pt.description:
Junte-se a detetives do mundo inteiro na versão digital oficial do jogo de tabuleiro Clue/Cluedo! Reúna provas cruciais, interrogue suspeitos e resolva o assassinato original.

Acompanhe Srta. Escarlate, Coronel Mostarda, Professor Ameixa, Chefe White, Senhora Pavão e Prefeito Green pela icônica Mansão Tudor, descobrindo seus motivos e álibis ao longo do caminho.

Curta Clue/Cluedo como você se lembra no Modo Clássico, ou entre em uma partida rápida com o modo Cartas Clue. Quer realmente testar suas habilidades de investigação? Experimente o novo formato exclusivo de Clue/Cluedo – Detetive Supremo.

No Modo Detetive Supremo, todos respondem às sugestões ao mesmo tempo… mas em segredo!

Encare os suspeitos em um interrogatório direto e confie em suas habilidades de dedução para chegar à verdade. Viva o mistério, resolva o crime e torne-se um detetive de elite!

COMO JOGAR CLUE/CLUEDO:
1. Três cartas são distribuídas viradas para baixo – essa é a solução do crime!
2. Todos recebem três Cartas Clue. Elas são automaticamente riscadas da sua folha de pistas, pois não fazem parte da solução.
3. Role os dados e mova-se pelo tabuleiro.
4. Ao entrar em um cômodo, você pode fazer uma sugestão – escolha quem você acha que é o assassino, com qual arma e onde ocorreu o crime.
5. Os outros jogadores tentarão refutar sua sugestão; se alguém tiver uma das cartas mencionadas, mostrará a você para desmenti-la.
6. Use sua folha de pistas para acompanhar os personagens, armas e cômodos já eliminados.
7. Acha que descobriu tudo? Então faça uma acusação! Mas cuidado – se estiver certo, você vence; se errar, está fora!

RECURSOS

- A CLÁSSICA MANSÃO TUDOR – Jogue o adorado tabuleiro original agora em animação 3D deslumbrante e sem anúncios!
- UM NOVO MODO DE JOGO – Exclusivo da versão digital de Clue/Cluedo, o Modo Detetive Supremo permite interrogar vários personagens ao mesmo tempo.
- MÚLTIPLOS MODOS – Compita contra oponentes de IA de ponta que se adaptam ao seu nível de habilidade para o jogo perfeito, ou desafie detetives ao redor do mundo.
- CONTEÚDO ORIGINAL ADICIONAL – O que aconteceu após os chocantes eventos na Mansão Tudor? Descubra em uma série de novas cenas do crime criadas exclusivamente para a versão digital de Clue/Cluedo! Otter is a simple and beautiful food diary app that helps you track what you eat every day. No calorie counting, no complicated databases – just take photos, add notes, and reflect on your eating habits.

◆ WHY OTTER?

- Clean, minimal design with an adorable otter character
- Photo-based meal tracking – snap and save
- No ads, no distractions
- iCloud sync across all your devices

◆ FEATURES

- Photo Food Journal
Capture your meals with photos. A picture is worth a thousand calories – see what you eat at a glance.

- Daily Notes
Write about your day, how you felt, or what made each meal special.

- Water Tracker
Stay hydrated! Track your daily water intake with simple tap controls.

- Weight Log
Monitor your weight trends over time with easy-to-read records.

- Timeline View
Browse your food history in a beautiful timeline. See patterns in your eating habits.

- Search & Stats
Find past meals quickly and view your eating statistics.

- iCloud Sync
Your food diary stays safe and syncs automatically across iPhone, iPad, and Mac.


◆ A MINDFUL APPROACH TO EATING

Otter doesn't judge. There's no calorie counting or strict diet plans. Just a gentle companion to help you become more aware of what you eat. 

You are what you eat – let Otter help you remember it.

Questions? Contact us at OtterDietDiary@gmail.com

The new game of the developer ""GameCoaster"", who made Dungeon Maker and Dungeon Defense!

A seemingly infinite stream of heroes invaded the dungeon and brought ruin to the Abyss.
Now you must go straight to the source of the enemy and return your home to its former glory.
Defeat the Army of Light and take back the power of the Abyss.

You are tasked with infiltrating a planet dominated by light all on your own.
You must bring down the heroes and use them to summon monsters to fight alongside you,
armed with the equipment of these fallen sacrifices.

Once you are strong enough, you may receive the blessings of the Dark Gods,
and combine their powers with those of your monsters to bring down colossal groups of enemies.

◇ 10 elite monsters and over 100 unique skills
◇ The Power of the Abyss gets stronger as you rebuild
◇ Roguelike with random choices and opportunities
